en: What is the current status of my ration card application?
What is the application reference number on file?
What are the pending requirements, if any?
What is the expected date of issue?
Who is the officer handling new ration card applications in my area?
What is the total sanctioned budget for this road work?
What is the official project completion date?
What amount has been released and utilised so far?
Who is the contractor/agency responsible for execution?
What is the current physical status of the work?
What is the approved teacher strength versus the current working strength in this school?
What is the total budget allocated for school infrastructure development this financial year?
What is the status of basic amenities (drinking water, separate toilets for girls and boys)?
What is the quantity of midday meals sanctioned and served per week?
What is the official fee and stamp duty structure for property registration in this zone?
What is the status of my property registration request submitted on the specified date?
What is the average timeline for issuing a registered deed copy after submission?
Who is the competent authority to report grievances regarding delayed registrations?
On what date was my pension application received?
What is the current status of my application?
What are the reasons, if any, for the delay?
Which officer is responsible for clearing pending applications?
By what date is the pension expected to be sanctioned?
What is the current status of my Aadhaar update/enrolment request?
What are the specific reasons for the delay in processing this request?
What is the escalation matrix for citizens whose Aadhaar updates are stuck beyond 30 days?
Who is the officer responsible for processing pending requests?

department: Ministry of External Affairs / Passport Office

en: What is the current status of my passport application?
On what date was my application received and verification initiated?
What are the specific reasons for the delay in issuing the passport?
By what date is the passport expected to be printed and dispatched?
What is the status of my income tax refund for the assessment year in question?
What is the reason for the delay in processing and releasing my refund?
Who is the assessing officer responsible for processing this refund request?
What is the status of my complaint registered on the railway grievance portal?
What is the action taken report (ATR) on my complaint?
Who is the public grievance officer responsible for resolving ticket/reservation disputes?
